Get computer training

December 1995
Journalism & NewsroomTechnology

Multiple computer-assisted reporting training seminars and bootcamps are available for journalists throughout early 1996, with registration open to all news professionals. Additionally, recordings and materials from the CAR Rock '95 conference are available for purchase.

Get computer training: NICAR Bootcamps, week-long intensive training seminars, Jan. 7-12, March 10-15, and May 19-24, Columbia, Mo. NICAR/Medill Broadcast Seminar, March 23-24, Chicago North Carolina Advanced Computer-Assisted Reporting Seminar, May 5-10, Chapel Hill, N.C.

These dates are open to all journalists. For more information, call NICAR, (314) 882-0684, or send e-mail to nicar@muccmail.missouri.edu.

Missed Cleveland? To order tape recordings of CAR Rock '95 sessions, call Sound Images at (303) 649-1811. For handouts, call Investigative Reporters and Editors at (314) 882-2042.
